meta.title: Horvath Systems
meta.desc: Horvath Systems — modern software development, automation, web & mobile solutions.
hero.lead: Horvath Systems — fast, clean, scalable solutions. Websites, admin dashboards, mobile apps, integrations, automation.
services.title: Services
services.lead: I build solutions that are fast, stable, and look great.
services.web.title: Web development
services.web.desc: Landing pages, portfolios, company sites, admin dashboards — modern UI, fast load, SEO basics.
services.mobile.title: Mobile apps
services.mobile.desc: Flutter apps with import/export, offline storage, QR/scan, settings, multi-language.
services.auto.title: Automation
services.auto.desc: Scripts, workflows, integrations, notifications — less manual work.
services.sec.title: Stability & hardening
services.sec.desc: Security basics, debugging, performance tuning, deploy & maintenance.
projects.title: Projects
proj.book.title: Book Manager (Flutter)
proj.book.desc: Import/Export, QR scan, local storage, HU/EN — clean UI and fast workflow.
proj.auto.title: Automation Toolkit
proj.auto.desc: Windows tools: tray icon, config reload, log viewer, notifications — “set and forget”.
proj.web.title: Modern landing + dashboard
proj.web.desc: Dark neon design, cards, stats, animations, responsive layout — modern feel.
about.title: About
about.desc: “Build clean. Ship fast.” — I focus on clarity, stability, UI quality, performance, and maintainability.

privacy.meta.title: Privacy Policy – Book Manager | Horvath Systems
privacy.body.html:
Privacy Policy – Book Manager

This application does not collect, store, or share any personal data.

All data entered by the user (such as book titles, authors, ISBN numbers) is stored locally on the user's device only.

The app does not use analytics, tracking, advertising, or third-party data collection services.

No user account or registration is required.

Contact:
If you have any questions, please contact: Horvath-Systems@proton.me
